untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (HTF structure bias, range continuation confirmation across timeframe pairs, noise filtering across multiple LTF bars) which cannot be fully expressed with single-timeframe indicators. Requires: (1) HTF range direction detection and bias persistence, (2) LTF breakout confirmation with multi-bar pressure validation, (3) cross-timeframe synchronization logic. These demand comparative logic between timeframes (HTF vs LTF) and historical state tracking not available in allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using Donchian Channel breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for range breakout detection and SMA_20 as directional bias filter. However, this loses the critical multi-timeframe hierarchy logic that distinguishes GRIMES_DRY_7_0. True implementation requires: (a) parallel HTF/LTF calculations, (b) bias persistence counter across range samples, (c) multi-bar pressure accumulation logic, (d) HTF structure reversal detection as dynamic stop condition.
